violations.text: Handwashing sink is lacking in back storage area where foods are re-packaged. A handwashing sink shall be located: (A) To allow convenient use by employees in food preparation, food dispensing, and warewashing areas; and (B) In, or immediately adjacent to, toilet rooms. Proof of installation to be sent to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 10/21/2024
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 09/04/2024
